commands.review_summary:
The PR threads model compat into OpenAI tool-schema normalization, declares Fireworks Kimi `not` as an unsupported schema keyword, and adds focused tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. On current main, OpenAI Responses and Completions conversion call `normalizeOpenAIStrictToolParameters` without `modelCompat`, and the Fireworks Kimi manifest row lacks `unsupportedToolSchemaKeywords`, so a `{ "not": {} }` tool schema cannot be stripped on that path.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair job is needed because this PR already contains the narrow fix, tests, manifest metadata, and changelog; the remaining action is normal maintainer review and CI/merge handling.

target.title: fix(agents): honor model.compat.unsupportedToolSchemaKeywords for OpenAI-completions tool schemas
